content_body:
"Time is like a river. You cannot touch the same water twice, because the flow that has passed will never pass again. Enjoy every moment of your life." 

Luxury Vacation Rentals in Blue Ridge GA

There is a special place in Blue Ridge, Georgia where the living is grand, the beauty is unsurpassed, and your spirit is refreshed. Over the years, Cabin Rentals of Georgia has selectively chosen luxury homes offering river frontage and river view cabins that soothe and delight. Experience a cabin trip in Georgia and make some memories.

If you are looking for a getaway that will refresh and rejuvenate your senses, our riverfront luxury cabins in Georgia will be sure to melt away the cares of this world, enabling you to enjoy every moment of your life. To feel the earth under your feet, to revel in the river rushing through your fingers, to experience the flow of the seasons, to smell the fresh mountain air of a new morning and to be awed by the peaceful, starry skies at night...this encapsulates the Blue Ridge Experience.  

Inspired by the natural beauty that embraces each and every corner, you will be immersed into a sophisticated river/mountain experience with the perfect blend of mountain lodge architecture and rustic elegance.

Aska Adventure Area River Cabins

Enjoy luxurious riverfront cabins in Georgia, some featuring spacious outdoor living spaces with fireplaces, while others offer open floor plans with spacious kitchens and big views of the Blue Ridge Mountains and the Toccoa River. In the reputable Aska Adventure Area, several beautiful luxury cabins can be found perched high on a ridge overlooking the Toccoa River in the very heart of the Aska Adventure Area or near the Toccoa River and hiking trails - where everything is at the thrill-seeker's fingertips - from hiking and kayaking, to mountain biking and gem mining. 

Toccoa River Activities From Your Cabin Rental

The Toccoa River is the main river running through Blue Ridge and feeds into Lake Blue Ridge.  We have a couple of 5-bedroom luxury cabin rentals along the Toccoa River which offers over 1,000 feet of river frontage.  

Georgia Trout Fishing

When not inside basking in the expansive views of the mountains and river, venture outdoors and find a path down to the river where you can enjoy fantastic trout fishing as the Cherokee Indians built one of their beautiful fish traps seen and used to great benefit right from our property.

Tubing and Whitewater Rafting

Put in a tube, canoe, or kayak and float northwards into the twin towns of McCaysville, GA/Copperhill, TN just a short 10 minute drive from the cabins. Once the river flows there, it becomes the Ocoee River in Tennessee. If adventure and excitement are the theme for the day, you are only 20-30  minutes away from experiencing the thrill of Class III-IV rapids at the Ocoee Whitewater Center. Riverfront cabins create beautiful memories for our guests as they immerse themselves in the beauty of North Georgia.

As one of our guests stated, "this part of the country is a beautiful canvas to paint life's most treasured times upon."
title: Riverfront Cabins
